purpose: Defines source/pixel sprite production readiness gates for weapon/class attack motions and player support motion templates.

coordinateConvention.sideRule: ScreenLeft and ScreenRight are screen-space labels, not anatomical labels.

globalPromptRules: Use the approved source body only as the pose, scale, lighting, and anchor-placement reference.
Keep canvas size, camera framing, body proportions, clothing style, and equipment attachment anchors locked to the reports.
Create only the requested attack frame variation for the selected gender and skin tone.
Use transparent background when possible; otherwise use a flat easy-to-key background.
No text, no watermark, no extra props, no camera change.

outputTypes.description: Clean high-detail source sprite frame used before pixel conversion.
rules: Match source-body lighting and anatomy quality.
Preserve readable muscles, hands, feet, head scale, and underwear style.
Do not introduce pixelated edges in the source output.

outputTypes.description: Game-ready pixelized sprite frame derived from the source frame.
rules: Preserve source silhouette and anchor positions by normalized coordinates.
Use crisp pixel edges and avoid blurry resizing.
Do not redraw equipment anchors independently from the source frame.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: one-hand sword and shield slash animation with shield remaining attached to the offhand anchor

frameNotes.attack_ready: Sword-side hand pulls back while feet stay locked.
frameNotes.attack_hit: Sword-side hand advances; this is the only damage-window frame.
frameNotes.attack_recover: Arms return toward the pose-template baseline.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: heavy two-hand weapon sweep with lower grip, upper grip, weapon tip, and back end aligned

frameNotes.attack_ready: Heavy weapon winds up behind the body with visible weight shift.
frameNotes.attack_hit: Weapon tip sweeps forward; this is the only damage-window frame.
frameNotes.attack_recover: Weapon returns toward the two-hand guard baseline.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: bow draw and release with bow grip, draw hand, arrow nock, and arrow tip separated

frameNotes.attack_ready: String is drawn back; arrow line stays nearly horizontal.
frameNotes.attack_hit: Arrow releases from the tip spawn anchor; this is the only damage-window frame.
frameNotes.attack_recover: Hands return toward the bow draw baseline.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: staff casting motion with cast hand and staff top kept as separate effect spawn choices

frameNotes.attack_ready: Cast hand gathers energy while the staff remains vertically readable.
frameNotes.attack_hit: Staff top and cast hand form the effect ray; this is the only damage-window frame.
frameNotes.attack_recover: Cast hand returns toward the staff stand baseline.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: wand and book casting motion with wand tip, cast hand, book grip, and book center kept distinct

frameNotes.attack_ready: Cast hand gathers energy while the offhand book stays supported.
frameNotes.attack_hit: Wand tip becomes the effect spawn; this is the only damage-window frame.
frameNotes.attack_recover: Cast hand and book return toward the wand-book baseline.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: close-range fist combo with left and right fist centers preserved for gauntlet attachment

frameNotes.attack_ready: Guard compresses before the strike while feet stay locked.
frameNotes.attack_hit: Screen-left fist advances; this is the only damage-window frame.
frameNotes.attack_recover: Fists return to the guard baseline.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: idle breathing loop with all visual equipment slots staying attached to stable body anchors

frameNotes.idle_low: Baseline idle frame with feet and hand grips locked.
frameNotes.idle_breathe_up: Chest and shoulders lift slightly while equipment follows transformed anchors.
frameNotes.idle_return: Body returns to the baseline idle frame without equipment drift.

spriteJobs.promptFocus: short hit reaction with body recoil while armor, weapon, offhand, gloves, boots, and helmet remain attached

frameNotes.hit_back: Body recoils backward with a hit flash posture while feet remain visually grounded.
frameNotes.hit_return: Body returns to the idle baseline with all equipment anchors restored.
